class Solution:
    def semiOrderedPermutation(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        pos1 = nums.index(1)
        posn = nums.index(n)
        
        # Swap 1 to the front
        swaps = pos1
        
        # Adjust position of n after swapping 1
        if posn < pos1:
            posn += 1
        
        # Swap n to the end
        swaps += (n - 1 - posn)
        
        return swaps
